meta.title: 问路和交通
meta.description: Intermediate directions and traffic vocabulary in Chinese: navigation, traffic jams, and crossing streets.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급 길 묻기와 교통 어휘: 길 안내, 교통 체증, 횡단.

explanation.en: 「往前走」(wǎng qián zǒu) means "go forward/walk ahead".

questions.prompt: 「往前走」是什么意思？(What does 往前走 mean?)

explanation.en: 「红绿灯」(hónglǜdēng) means "traffic light".

questions.prompt: 「红绿灯」是什么意思？(What does 红绿灯 mean?)

explanation.en: 「堵车」(dǔchē) means "traffic jam".

questions.prompt: 「堵车」是什么意思？(What does 堵车 mean?)

explanation.en: 「转弯」(zhuǎnwān) means "to turn/make a turn".

questions.prompt: 「转弯」是什么意思？(What does 转弯 mean?)

explanation.en: 「过马路」(guò mǎlù) means "to cross the street".

questions.prompt: 「过马路」是什么意思？(What does 过马路 mean?)

explanation.en: 「往」(wǎng) means "toward", used before a direction: 往右转 = "turn right".

questions.prompt: 从这儿一直走，到第二个路口___右转。(Go straight from here, turn right at the second intersection.)

explanation.en: 「堵」(dǔ) means "congested/blocked"; 路上很堵 = "the road is jammed".

questions.prompt: 现在是上班高峰期，路上很___。(It's rush hour now, the road is very congested.)

explanation.en: 「怎么走」asks how to get somewhere on foot/by route.
explanation.ko: 「怎么走」는 어떻게 가는지 길을 묻는 표현이다.

questions.prompt: 请问，去火车站怎么___？(Excuse me, how do I get to the train station?)

explanation.en: 「先」(xiān) means "first", indicating priority of the action.

questions.prompt: 过马路的时候要___看红绿灯。(When crossing the street, you must watch the traffic light.)

explanation.en: 「到」(dào) means "to arrive/reach", used to describe reaching a destination.

questions.prompt: 这条路一直走，走到底就___地铁站了。(Walk straight down this road, at the end you'll reach the subway station.)

explanation.en: 「顺着」(shùnzhe) means "along/following [a path]".

questions.prompt: 你___这条路一直走，就能看到超市。(If you walk straight down this road, you'll see the supermarket.)

explanation.en: 「迷路」(mílù) means "to get lost".

questions.prompt: 对不起，我___了，这不是去机场的路。(Sorry, I got lost, this is not the road to the airport.)

explanation.en: 「洗手间」(xǐshǒujiān) means "restroom".

questions.prompt: 这附近有___吗？我想上厕所。(Is there a restroom nearby? I need to use the toilet.)

explanation.en: 「方便」(fāngbiàn) means "convenient".

questions.prompt: 坐地铁比开车___，因为不用担心堵车。(Taking the subway is more convenient than driving, because you don't have to worry about traffic jams.)

explanation.en: 「天桥」(tiānqiáo) means "pedestrian overpass".

questions.prompt: 这座桥是给行人走的，叫___。(This bridge is for pedestrians, it's called an overpass.)

explanation.en: 「转弯」means "to turn", commonly used in navigation instructions.
explanation.ko: 「转弯」는 '방향을 틀다'라는 뜻으로 내비게이션 안내에 자주 쓰인다.

questions.prompt: 导航说前面五百米就要___了。(The navigation says to turn in 500 meters ahead.)

explanation.en: 「就」here indicates the resulting consequence: 就迟到了 = "ended up being late".
explanation.ko: 「就」는 여기서 결과를 나타내며 '就迟到了'는 '결국 지각했다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 因为路上堵车，我___迟到了。(Because of the traffic jam, I ended up being late.)

explanation.en: 「不能」(bù néng) means "cannot/not allowed to", indicating a prohibition.
explanation.ko: 「不能」(bù néng)는 '~할 수 없다, ~해서는 안 된다'는 뜻으로 금지를 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 这条街禁止停车，你___把车停在这里。(Parking is prohibited on this street, you can't park your car here.)

explanation.en: 「有多远」asks "how far", a common question about distance.

questions.prompt: 请问最近的公交车站离这儿___？(Excuse me, how far is the nearest bus stop from here?)

explanation.en: 「到」means "to arrive", indicating the trip's completion.

questions.prompt: 如果不堵车，二十分钟就能___。(If there's no traffic, twenty minutes is enough to arrive.)

explanation.en: 「怎么」(the question word) must come before the verb 走 (walk): 怎么走 (not 走怎么).
explanation.ko: 의문사 「怎么」는 동사 '走' 앞에 와야 하므로 '怎么走'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 请问，去火车站走怎么？(Excuse me, how do I get to the train station?) — find the error

explanation.en: The location phrase 到第二个路口 (at the second intersection) must come before the direction verb 往右转 (turn right), in proper sequential order.
explanation.ko: 장소구 '到第二个路口'는 방향 동사 '往右转' 앞에 순차적으로 와야 한다.

questions.prompt: 从这儿一直走右转到第二个路口。(Go straight from here, turn right at the second intersection.) — find the error
choices: 从这儿一直走，到第二个路口往右转。
从这儿一直走右转到第二个路口。
从这儿一直右转走到第二个路口。
从这儿走一直到第二个路口右转。

explanation.en: The correct order is subject + predicate: 路上堵车 ("the road is congested"), not 堵车路上 which reverses subject and verb.
explanation.ko: 올바른 어순은 주어+술어인 '路上堵车'이며 '堵车路上'은 주어와 술어가 뒤바뀐 오류이다.

questions.prompt: 因为堵车路上，我迟到了。(Because of the traffic jam, I was late.) — find the error
choices: 因为路上堵车，我迟到了。
因为堵车路上，我迟到了。
因为路上我堵车，我迟到了。
路上因为堵车，我迟到了。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 从这儿一直走，到第二个路口往右转 ("Go straight from here, turn right at the second intersection").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '从这儿一直走，到第二个路口往右转' (여기서 쭉 가다가 두 번째 교차로에서 우회전하세요)이 된다.

questions.prompt: 从这儿一直走，__________。(Go straight from here, turn right at the second intersection.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 因为路上堵车，我就迟到了 ("Because of the traffic jam, I ended up being late").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '因为路上堵车，我就迟到了' (길이 막혀서 결국 지각했다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 因为路上堵车，__________。(Because of the traffic jam, I ended up being late.)
